criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings from app stores and review platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Trustpilot

criteria.name: Features
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of AI-powered financial management features.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Measures taken to protect user data and financial information.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Pricing structure, including free versions and subscription fees.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use and interface design.
